question: Which particular events sparked each one of the different Arab Israeli wars
reference_answer: ['United Nations General Assembly vote for the Partition Plan for Palestine on 29 November 1947', 'the adoption of the United Nations Partition Plan for Palestine on 29 November 1947', 'Nationalization of the Suez Canal, closing the canal to Israeli shipping and closing the Straits of Tiran to Israeli shipping', 'Egypt closing the Straits of Tiran to Israeli shipping on 22 May 1967', 'Israel declining a peace proposal to withdrawal from the Sinai Peninsula']
